change.diff_summary: Added nn.Dropout(0.15) to ConditionalDenoiser after first ReLU

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: Dropout regularizes the denoiser to prevent overfitting to US-specific flu patterns, improving cross-country generalization.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: nn.Dropout(0.15) after first ReLU randomly drops 15% of hidden units, forcing redundant representations.

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — Add dropout 0.15 to ConditionalDenoiser
